name: Pecan Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread pecans on a cookie sheet and roast in a preheated 350°F oven for 10 minutes.
2. Coarsely chop half of the roasted pecans and reserve them for garnish.
3. Place the remaining pecans into a blender or food processor container.
4. Add butter, lemon juice, and Worcestershire sauce; blend until very smooth.
